error_signature: Node does not have any credentials set for "googleApi"
title: Google Chat node missing credentials in production mode
symptom: The Google Chat node works in test mode but fails in production with an error about missing credentials.
not_this_if: Workflow runs successfully in production with other nodes
Error does not occur in test mode
root_cause: The Google Chat node requires OAuth2 credentials to be set for production execution. These credentials may not be properly configured or linked in the production environment, leading to the error when the workflow is activated.
fix_steps: Open the Google Chat node settings in your workflow
Ensure that the correct OAuth2 credentials are selected
Test the workflow again in production mode
agent_instruction: Check and set the OAuth2 credentials for the Google Chat node in production mode.
